briefdescription.para: Resolves all block and inline style rules.

parameterdescription.para: The style to use for selector resolution.
The block target to write to.
The document node to render. nullptr produces empty output.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TextNode &node, const StyleRule &listItemRule, const ListItemLayout &listItemLayout, const RenderContext &context)
memberdef.name: appendListItem

briefdescription.para: Streams a TextNode tree into render blocks.
